name: Dawnbreaker
description: Darkness fears the break of dawn! Valora, the Dawnbreaker.

abilities.name: Break of Dawn
abilities.description: Whenever the sun comes out, Valora gains bonus base damage and vision that decreases throughout the course of the day. The higher Valora's level, the greater the applied health restore reduction value.

abilities.name: Starbreaker
abilities.description: Dawnbreaker whirls her hammer multiple times, damaging enemies with her attack plus bonus damage. Grants magic resistance bonus and unobstructed movement during Starbreaker. Dawnbreaker is now slowed, but Starbreaker prevents her from being slowed lower than the set value.

abilities.name: Celestial Hammer
abilities.description: Brightmaul leaves a trail of fire that damages and slows enemies along the way. Brightmaul's trail of fire now additionally grants bonus movement speed to allied unit.

abilities.name: Luminosity
abilities.description: After a number of attacks, Dawnbreaker powers up, charging her next attack with a critical strike that heals allied heroes within the radius. Luminosity heal is less effective from attacking enemy and neutral creeps.
